evals.prompt: Write an internal postmortem for yesterday's SEV2 login outage.
evals.expected_output: Produces an internal postmortem artifact with severity rationale, quantified impact, timeline, root cause, action items, validation checks, and Status.

evals.prompt: Create a client report and include stack traces so customers understand the issue.
evals.expected_output: Generates sanitized client-facing content and excludes stack traces, internal service names, and architecture details.

evals.prompt: The root cause was human error. Finish the postmortem.
evals.expected_output: Rejects human error as terminal root cause and continues asking why the system allowed the error to cause impact.
